title: Hu Tao Summon Egg + Staff of Homa
description: An egg is added in game which can be used to summon Hu Tao and her signature weapon Staff of Homa.
body:
This mod adds the Staff of Homa, a powerful weapon and the Hu Tao Spawn Egg to summon her into your world. Tame Hu Tao using cooked salmon. Crafting recipes for both items can be found in the Gallery tab.

The texture of the staff of homa is bad and there are unfinished stuffs. I'll update it later on.
